instruction: Reply to Emilia Park at Northline Residency about the application packet. Thank her for reaching out, tell her I can send my portfolio PDF and artist statement, and ask whether they'd also like a short bio and exhibition history included.

rule_ref.rule_text: For outreach, applications, or other important messages, she prefers to have a draft prepared for review instead of sending the message immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I like important messages drafted first so I can sit with the wording before anything goes out.

attributes.subject: Northline Residency application packet
attributes.body: Hi Theodora, thanks again for your interest in the Northline Residency. If you'd like to apply for the spring cohort, send along your portfolio PDF and artist statement when you have a chance. If you already have a short bio or exhibition history prepared, we can include those too.

attributes.subject: Poster pickup details
attributes.body: Your print order is ready for pickup at the River Posters studio. Let me know if you'd rather have it mailed instead.

attributes.subject: Reading series check-in
attributes.body: Just checking whether you're still interested in joining our small reading series later this season. No pressure if your schedule is full.
